title: Founded as Pax IV Hyper
body: Established within Keio University's Boy Scout chapter as an overseas dispatch team for international cooperation.

title: Asia-wide Expansion
body: Nepal disaster prevention education, East Japan earthquake relief, Mongolia afforestation and clean energy projects.

title: Axis — Independent Relaunch
body: Separated from Keio Rover Scout chapter and relaunched as an independent student organization, triggered by new leadership. Clearer accountability, expanded to Malaysia.

title: 3 Countries, Active
body: Mongolia · Nepal · Malaysia. Still field-first. Still youth-led. Still connecting the world.
